name: car-geo
description: Monorepo da plataforma CAR Geo — API geoespacial aberta (OGC API Features) + portal de desenvolvedor. haCARthon · Desafio 2 · Solução 7.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "yarn workspace @car-geo/api dev" "yarn workspace @car-geo/web dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace @car-geo/api build && yarn workspace @car-geo/web build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @car-geo/api typecheck && yarn workspace @car-geo/web typecheck
